basics.name: Lucas Zanotelli dos Santos
basics.headline: DevOps & Data Infrastructure Engineer | Terraform, Kubernetes, Airflow
basics.content: DevOps and Data Infrastructure Engineer with expertise in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), container orchestration (Kubernetes), and CI/CD pipeline automation. Certified Apache Airflow professional with a track record of architecting scalable, cloud-native solutions on AWS, GCP, and Azure. Combines deep technical skill with a leadership mindset, having mentored teams and embedded DevOps culture to deliver 3x deployment frequency improvements and petabyte-scale data platforms that drive business outcomes.

work.summary: Indicium AI is data-driven, specializing in data science, analytics, and AI solutions. Lead engineering teams through hypergrowth while embedding DevOps/DataOps practices.
highlights: Institutionalized DevOps culture: implemented Terraform for infrastructure-as-code, containerization with Kubernetes, and robust CI/CD pipelines, increasing deployment frequency 3x and reducing production incidents by 40%.

Orchestrated 5 critical data pipelines using Apache Airflow (certified) for both batch and real-time processing, integrating API services and automated monitoring that cut incident response time by 60%.
Scaled the data platform to 1+ petabyte across distributed storage systems on AWS/GCP, leveraging Databricks and Snowflake, boosting data accessibility for analytics by 40%.

Led cross-functional collaboration with analysts and product managers, translating requirements into scalable technical solutions while mentoring junior engineers on DevOps best practices and cloud architecture.

work.summary: Delivery-only kitchen producing plant-based cheese. Built the entire technical foundation from the ground up.
highlights: Provisioned and managed cloud-native infrastructure on GCP (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL/PostgreSQL), ensuring high availability and cost efficiency as the business scaled.
Developed a data-driven production pipeline that reduced waste by 30% and increased output by 20%, demonstrating ability to drive business impact through technical systems.

work.summary: Artisanal cachaça distillery. Led digital transformation initiatives across all operations.
highlights: Introduced data-driven workflows and digital marketing systems, improving operational transparency and decision-making.

work.summary: Center for Natural Disasters Research at UFSC.
highlights: Automated manual data processing with Python and Shell scripts, reducing staff workload by over 50% and accelerating disaster database updates.
Helped build a nationwide digital database of environmental disasters by migrating data from hard-copy documents.

volunteer.summary: Non-profit organization that offers programs to reduce stress and develop leadership skills.
highlights: Facilitated stress-management workshops for 100+ participants, developing strong communication and leadership skills.

volunteer.summary: Student organization building a prototype car for energy efficiency competitions.
highlights: Developed firmware and hardware for embedded telemetry systems, serving as electronics technical manager at international competitions in Brazil and USA.

projects.name: Odoo ERP with e-Commerce
highlights: Deployed Odoo CE (v13) on a Compute Engine Linux VM, with a separate Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL 9.6) instance for database management.
